title.en: Ye Tian stopped these five Ninefold Beings, mak...

content.en:
Ye Tian stopped these five Ninefold Beings, making them stunned.

"Endless Ancestor, you won't let us leave? Ridiculous, is it possible that you are still sure to leave us?"

The five Ninefold Supreme Beings were very puzzled, although Ye Tian's strength was stronger than them, he was not very powerful.

If they wanted to leave, Ye Tian couldn't stop them at all.

Why did Ye Tian dare to stop and threaten them?

"Endless Ancestor, get out of the way immediately!"

The five Ninefold Supremes said coldly.

"You dare to threaten the Dark Forbidden Realm and me, then fall here, I hope you have the ability to clone, otherwise you will really die today!"

After speaking, Ye Tian made a move.

This time, he did not show mercy to his subordinates, but showed all his combat power.

Rumble!!!!!

The Endless Eternal Body of the Perfection Realm all burst out with power, and the extremely powerful Eternal Technique of a gate was also unleashed.

Buzz Buzz !!!

Countless terrifying sword qi tore through the rules and slashed towards the five Ninefold Supremes, which was an eternal technique that was urged with all its might—the Shattering Void Sword.

Today's Shattered Void Sword has been perfected by Ye Tian, and it is even more terrifying than in the past, and it has been cultivated to a very high level.

The power of this sword has reached the power of the weakest half-step Eternal Realm.

The five Ninefold Supremes resisted the sword with all their might, but they were still severely damaged.

"The power of the half-step Eternal Realm!"

The expressions of the five Ninefold Supreme Beings changed drastically.

How is it possible for a Sevenfold Supreme to exert a power comparable to that of a Ninefold Being?

Although the power of the weakest half-step Eternal Realm is not comparable to those top half-step Eternal Realms at all, they still can't beat it!

They weren't the kind of demons who were Ninefold Supreme enough to be comparable to the half-step Eternal Realm!

"Run!"

The idea was immediately generated by the five Ninefold Beings.

Immediately, they used their hole cards and ran away as fast as they could.

For example, there was a Ninefold Supreme One who took out a top-notch source weapon that could pierce through the Void of the Source Sea and cross the Void from a long distance, thus escaping from here.

There is also a Ninefold Supreme who uses a secret treasure that can temporarily increase the speed by a hundredfold, but it can only be used once.

In short, they all tried their best to escape for their lives.

If they stay here, they won't survive.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian also used his hole cards to cast the Broken Finger and urged the power of the Eternal Realm Finger.

Suddenly, a blow comparable to the powerful half-step Eternal Realm directly shattered the Source Sea Void, and a large area directly collapsed and shattered, and the three Ninefold Supreme Beings did not escape in time, they were directly smashed and crushed into pieces, and their vitality was directly wiped out.

One hit is a spike, and none of the hole cards save their lives.

This is the difference between an ordinary top Nine Heavens peak powerhouse and a powerful half-step Eternal Realm combat power, the gap is really too big.

At this time, another Ninefold Supreme was seriously injured, and another escaped through the void.

"I said, you can't escape!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After killing the seriously injured Ninefold Supreme with another blow, he immediately activated the Void Source Palace, locked the opponent's position, and began to chase and kill.

......

Somewhere in the source sea.

The last of the Five Ninefold Supreme Beings, the Qi Blood Origin Ancestor, used the Source Weapon to pierce through the void and came to a certain area, and immediately breathed a sigh of relief.

He felt that Ye Tian would not be able to catch up with him in time, and by the time Ye Tian chased here, he would have already left.

"Get out of here first!"

Qi Blood Ancestor is leaving.

Suddenly, a powerful force appeared, suppressing this void.

Then, Ye Tian's body walked out of the void.

"How could it be ......?"

Qi Blood Origin Ancestor was shocked.

He had already guessed in a large array why Ye Tian was chasing after him so quickly, it must be that he had a special source weapon or other treasure that could teleport in the void over a long distance and lock the location.

Moreover, when they were fighting, Ye Tian silently locked the position of the five of them, so when he used the source weapon to escape, he was already locked.

Otherwise, Ye Tian wouldn't know where he teleported, so he wouldn't be able to chase him down.

"So from the beginning, he wanted to kill the five of us!"

Qi Blood Source Ancestor's heart trembled.

"Endless Ancestor, let me tell you who is going to deal with you, don't kill me!"

Qi Blood Source Ancestor begged for mercy.

"No, I can find out!"

Ye Tian urged the Shattering Finger and killed the Qi Blood Origin Ancestor with one blow.

After returning to the Dark Forbidden Domain, Ye Tian entered the Source God Pavilion and asked to see the Wind Ancient Source Ancestor.

Soon, Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor saw Ye Tian.

"Endless Ancestor, what are you looking for me?"

Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor asked.

Ye Tian hurriedly said: "Lord Wind Ancient Origin Ancestor, I want to ask, if there is a conflict between the members of the Inner Circle of the Source God Pavilion and each other, will the Source God Pavilion participate?"

Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor knew what Ye Tian meant, and said directly: "If there are members of the inner circle asking for help, our twelve ancestors will take action once, but they can only do it once, this is the welfare of every inner circle member." "

"Wind Ancient Ancestor, I understand!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly, and then left.

The Twelve Ancestors will take action, but the premise is that the Wind Ancient Origin Ancestors and their Twelve Ancestors have received a distress message and can come in time.

What if the inner member doesn't have time to call for help?

Therefore, relying on the blessing of the Source God Pavilion is of no great use at all.

For the other supremes, the Source God Pavilion is just a loose organization, and it is not bad to use it for trading, but it will not really help a member for free.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian contacted other members of the inner enclosure and traded some treasure resources to get a piece of information, that is, which member has a relationship with Jinlan Mountain?

This information was not difficult to check, so Ye Tian naturally found it.

Among the many members of the inner circle, only one belongs to Cam Ranh Mountain.

This is Ge Fei Yuan Ancestor!

Ge Fei Yuan Ancestor is a ninefold supreme being of Jinlan Mountain, and he is also one of the founders.

After getting the news, Ye Tian immediately came to Jinlan Mountain.

Source sea, Jinlan realm.

This is the eternal heaven and earth, and Cam Ranh Mountain is the dominant force of the Cam Ranh world.

When Ye Tian descended here, he used his copying talent to explore Jinlan Mountain, but he didn't find Ge Fei Yuan Ancestor.

Immediately, he arrested the Supreme One of Jinlan Mountain and interrogated him.

Eventually, these supreme beings would not be able to contact Gefei Ancestor.

Obviously, Ge Fei Yuanzu ran away.

Ye Tian didn't kill these supreme beings of Jinlan Mountain, they didn't know about it, and it was useless to kill them, but Ye Tian still snatched the treasure house of Jinlan Mountain, which was regarded as a punishment for them.

In addition, if Ge Fei Yuan Ancestor is discovered in the future, he will hunt him down as soon as possible, not giving the other party a chance to survive.

Somewhere in the void of the source sea.

Ge Fei Yuanzu appeared here, and he looked flustered and helpless at this time.

"Damn, the strength of the Endless Ancestor is so terrifying, the Qi Blood Source Ancestor and they have all fallen, fortunately I escaped fast enough, otherwise I would have died!"

"In the future, the Jinlan Realm will not be able to go back, and the Source God Pavilion will not be able to enter, so we must find a place to hide. "

Ge Fei Yuanzu muttered to himself.

Soon, he disappeared into the area without a trace.
